caption: A person's hands manipulate a clear plastic sleeve and a collectible card over a surface featuring a logo with green palm trees and a orange circular border. A small white pedestal holds a yellow object in the background. To the right, a smaller inset video window shows a man with a beard wearing a dark blue t-shirt sitting at a desk with equipment. On-screen text in red and white reads "JASPYS" and "CASEBREAKS.COM". As the sequence progresses, the hands move the clear sleeve, eventually revealing a card with a signature inside a gold-bordered case. The background elements, including the palm tree logo, the pedestal, and the inset video of the man, remain consistent throughout the action.
